# NIP-39 Reference Card

kind: 10011 declares external identities in profiles using "i" tags with two parameters: platform:identity and proof. Required tags: kind, i. Optional tags: none. Filter pattern: kind = 10011. JSON example: {"kind": 10011, "tags": [["i", "github:semisol", "9721ce4ee4fceb91c9711ca2a6c9a5ab"]]}.
